title: Robo
description: A mod that adds new armor, ore, and other cool things. Robots coming soon
body: This mod adds 2 new Metals that will alow you to make power armor, the proto drill, power sword, and robot parts. It also adds a new wood type called dead lands oak along with the new biome called dead lands in it you can find oil and the dead land block. This mods goal is to add a fun robot/tech element to Minecraft.
